headline: DEPEND® AND DEION "COACH PRIME" SANDERS ENCOURAGE PROACTIVE CARE DURING MEN'S HEALTH MONTH
summary: This Men's Health Month, Depend®, the #1 brand of absorbent underwear, and Deion "Coach Prime" Sanders are encouraging men to take a proactive approach to their health with "Depend Wake Up Calls" – reminding Men to stop putting off regular checkups and screenings.

raw.headline: DEPEND® AND DEION "COACH PRIME" SANDERS ENCOURAGE PROACTIVE CARE DURING MEN'S HEALTH MONTH

headline: Kimberly-Clark credits supply chain for productivity gains
summary: The Kleenex-maker said simplifying its value stream, optimizing its network and scaling automation have been key contributors to a five-year improvement plan.

raw.headline: Kimberly-Clark credits supply chain for productivity gains
raw.summary: The Kleenex-maker said simplifying its value stream, optimizing its network and scaling automation have been key contributors to a five-year improvement plan.
